title: Dot Blot Preparation

Whatman 3MM filter paper, cut 12.3X16 cm (2 sheets)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"d37i8","text":"7.) SSC solutions: 1X, 5X, 20X","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"b4p50","text":"       20X SSC (1000 mL): ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"158oc","text":"175.3 g NaCl","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"b6qno","text":"88.2 g sodium citrate","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"2ko5p","text":"adjust pH to 7.0 with NaOH","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"e2pd1","text":" 8.) 96-well assay plates","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"790da","text":"9.) hybridot dot blot apparatus and pump","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"1mtc1","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"2dd44","text":"Note: Load the membranes so that when scanned, the second blot of the set may be placed under the first, i.e., load as the following diagram shows:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"6afrv","text":" ","type":"atomic","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":0,"length":1}],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"imageblock","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"1062C0BA75124E7890E76EDE4B4E12E1","height":null,"is_video":false,"mime":null,"original_name":"dot blot image.png","placeholder":"https://content.protocols.io/cvdc2xe.png","source":"https://content.protocols.io/cvdc2xe.png","width":null}}}}
steps: Chill on ice.
Wet the membrane in 1X SSC ≥60 min. 01:00:00
On the hybridot manifold, place a piece of Whatman 3MM filter paper and wet with 20X SSC.
Roll air pockets out.
Mount the membrane on top of the 3MM paper (centered).
Roll air pockets out.
Wash the membrane with 5X SSC (ca. 25 ml) with vacuum filtration.
Screw the top of the hybridot manifold in place, then shut off the vacuum pump.
Add 200 µl of 5X SSC to each well.
Add DNAs (50 µl each) to the wells.
Turn on the vacuum pump and draw samples onto the membrane.
Wash each well with 400 µl of 5X SSC (2X).
Remove membrane and crosslink under UV light (200 mJ).
Store the membranes wrapped in plastic at 4°C. Note: Load the membranes so that when scanned, the second blot of the set may be placed under the first, i.e., load as the diagram in guidelines shows.
Prepare DNAs in 1.2 µg/48.6 µl concentrations.
Distribute 97.2 µl of each to 96-well plates in the same pattern as the 1.0 µg samples will be loaded onto the membrane.
Make 3 serial 1/2 dilutions with each DNA sample (48.6 µl into 48.6 µl 1XTE).
Discard 48.6 µl from the final dilution.
Add 5.4 µl of 1 M NaOH to each sample.
Cover plates with parafilm.
Incubate at 37°C, 30 min. 00:30:00
Add 6.0 µl of 1 M acetic acid to each sample.
creator: Irina Agarkova
